ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "major" INTEGER /* Major identifier for the property */,
  "minor" INTEGER /* Minor identifier for the property */,
  "plat_nbr" TEXT /* Plat number for the property */,
  "plat_type" TEXT /* Type of plat */,
  "plat_lot" TEXT /* Lot number on the plat */,
  "plat_block" TEXT /* Block number on the plat */,
  "property_type" INTEGER /* Type of property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "principal_use" INTEGER /* Principal use of the property */,
  "property_class" TEXT /* Class of the property */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "property_address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "garage" INTEGER /* Number of garage spaces */,
  "zoning" TEXT /* Zoning classification of the property */,
  "last_appraisal_date" TEXT /* Date of the last appraisal */,
  "last_appraisal_value" INTEGER /* Value of the last appraisal */,
  "tax_assessment_year" INTEGER /* Year of the last tax assessment */,
  "tax_assessment_value" INTEGER /* Value of the last tax assessment */,
  "property_version" TEXT /* Version number of the property record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the seller */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the seller */,
  "seller_type" TEXT /* Type of seller (e.g., individual, corporation) */,
  "seller_tax_id" TEXT /* Tax ID of the seller */,
  "seller_agent" TEXT /* Name of the seller's real estate agent */,
  "seller_agent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the seller's agent */,
  "seller_lawyer" TEXT /* Name of the seller's lawyer */,
  "seller_lawyer_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the seller's lawyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the buyer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the buyer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the buyer */,
  "buyer_type" TEXT /* Type of buyer (e.g., individual, corporation) */,
  "buyer_tax_id" TEXT /* Tax ID of the buyer */,
  "buyer_agent" TEXT /* Name of the buyer's real estate agent */,
  "buyer_agent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the buyer's agent */,
  "buyer_lawyer" TEXT /* Name of the buyer's lawyer */,
  "buyer_lawyer_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the buyer's lawyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "property_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "min_square_footage" INTEGER /* Minimum square footage for this property type */,
  "max_square_footage" INTEGER /* Maximum square footage for this property type */,
  "common_features" TEXT /* Common features associated with this property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principal_uses" (
  "principal_use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal use */,
  "principal_use_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal use (e.g., single-family home, office building) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the principal use */,
  "min_square_footage" INTEGER /* Minimum square footage for this principal use */,
  "max_square_footage" INTEGER /* Maximum square footage for this principal use */,
  "common_features" TEXT /* Common features associated with this principal use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("principal_use_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sale_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the sale instrument (e.g., deed, contract) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sale instrument */,
  "legal_requirements" TEXT /* Legal requirements for using this instrument */,
  "common_clauses" TEXT /* Common clauses included in this type of instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_classes" (
  "property_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property class */,
  "property_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the property class (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property class */,
  "min_square_footage" INTEGER /* Minimum square footage for this property class */,
  "max_square_footage" INTEGER /* Maximum square footage for this property class */,
  "common_features" TEXT /* Common features associated with this property class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., property manager, legal advisor, financial analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legal_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legal document */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property transaction the document is associated with */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of legal document (e.g., deed, contract) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the legal document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the legal document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sale_reasons" (
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale reason */,
  "reason_name" TEXT /* Name of the sale reason (e.g., relocation, investment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sale reason */,
  "common_outcomes" TEXT /* Common outcomes associated with this sale reason */,
  "legal_consequences" TEXT /* Legal consequences of this sale reason */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reason_id")
)
